diagnostics.message: Ignored line-height: RN Text uses default line height from fontSize.
Ignored white-space: RN Text handles wrapping via numberOfLines.
Ignored line-height: Button uses fixed height; line-height: 0 is a browser hack.
Ignored cursor: RN Pressable owns touch behavior.
Ignored user-select: Not a native style prop.
Ignored transition: Animation requires an explicit native animation strategy.
Ignored outline: Focus ring handled through component state, not CSS outline.
Ignored outline-offset: Focus ring handled through component state, not CSS outline.
Ignored line-height: Button uses fixed height; line-height: 0 is a browser hack.
Ignored cursor: RN Pressable owns touch behavior.
Ignored box-sizing: RN always uses border-box.
Ignored background-clip: Not a RN style prop.
Ignored vertical-align: Not a RN style prop.
